# ScalAnt

This directory contains the IMPACT-maintained source snapshot used by the released `AF-S` wrapper for `ScalAnt`.

Reference method:
- paper: `Scalable Video Action Anticipation with Cross Linear Attentive Memory` (WACV 2026)

Snapshot status:
- this is not a bundled mirror of a separate upstream repository
- the directory contains the IMPACT release implementation of the `ScalAnt` baseline used in the paper benchmark
- runnable benchmark entrypoints live under `tasks/AF-S/scalant/`

Licensing:
- repository-authored files in this snapshot follow the repository root `LICENSE`
- adapted third-party components retain source attribution in file-level comments
